config.content.title: About RummyRoyal
config.content.description: Building India's most trusted and innovative online rummy platform since 2015.
config.story.title: Our Story
config.story.content: RummyRoyal was founded with a simple vision: to bring the joy of rummy to every Indian household through a safe, fair, and innovative digital platform. What started as a small team of passionate card game enthusiasts has grown into India's leading online rummy destination, serving millions of players across the country.
